setting.note: Philadelphia and the making of a financier: the banks and brokerages of Third Street, the Exchange, the penitentiary on Fairmount. Dreiser builds Frank Cowperwood’s rise from the real ledgers of the city, and it brings Philadelphia into the atlas.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Theodore Dreiser published this in 1912.
